approach_modifier: Read as a knowledgeable peer doing a thorough review. Follow leads that seem promising. Give benefit of the doubt on genuinely borderline cases — flag something if the evidence leans toward it being wrong.
reexamine_rule: If you find zero issues, a brief second look is optional but not required.
notes: All three lenses (Structural Integrity, Factual Accuracy, Coherence & Craft) returned clean. All iteration-1 fixes verified as correctly applied. Threshold now consistent at 95 across Executive Summary and Methodology. Meta-Judge finding correctly states 2 reviewers and 8-12% absolute gain (77.26% vs 68.89%). References section present. PRM lower-bound qualifier restored. PoLL framing aligned with Conclusions. No regressions introduced.

accuracy.adversary: CLEAN — borderline note on 8-12% range upper bound, but within framework's own characterization; benefit of doubt applied at skepticism 2
